task_description: Sprint 7: Integrations & Intelligence - Gmail deep integration with inbox scanning, Google Slides AI presentation generation, Spotify enhancement with custom playlists, web research for tasks, automated email notifications (deadline reminders, daily digest, weekly review), and comprehensive settings toggles for all features.

verification.summary: Frontend build+lint pass with no errors. All backend Python files compile cleanly. No test regressions. Review issues addressed: auth token moved from query to POST body, HTML injection fixed with html.escape(), scheduler state persisted to Firestore, SlidesGeneratorModal useState replaced with useEffect, research results labeled as AI-generated.

applied: Auth token moved from query parameter to POST body for preferences endpoint
Research results labeled as AI-generated with disclaimer and per-link indicators
Scheduler timestamps persisted to Firestore instead of module-level variables
SlidesGeneratorModal useState hack replaced with useEffect
HTML output encoding via html.escape() added to all email templates
skipped_with_todo: Rate limiting on AI endpoints - TODO comments added, acceptable for MVP
Orphaned presentation cleanup - TODO comment added, acceptable for MVP
skipped_no_action: Email body in AI prompts - already has OPAQUE DATA defense, acceptable for now
No tests for new code - project uses passWithNoTests, no test infrastructure
